name: 65" Conway Cast Iron Bookshelf - Threshold™
description:
Rustic charm and industrial flair dominate this impressive Conway Cast Iron Bookcase from Threshold™. Crafted from a sturdy metal frame, this four-tiered tower bookcase lends form and functionality to your space, all in one go. The open-style design offers an airy appeal while displaying your books and collectibles to advantage. The centered X-accent at back adds functional flair to the whole, preventing books or essentials from spilling over. Wide wooden shelves provide ample storage space and can house anything — from books to media essentials and memorabilia — leaving your space neatly organized and clutter-free. Pop a lush green plant atop for a refreshing splash of greenery.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
